modules_reported: Upstream, Core, Downstream (cradle-to-grave); no EN 15804 A1-A3 columns
note: This EPD reports modules as Upstream/Core/Downstream rather than EN 15804 A1-A3. The Upstream module (raw material extraction/chemical manufacturing) corresponds to A1 and the Core module (transport to plant, blending, packaging) corresponds to A2-A3, so values shown are the sum of Upstream+Core. GWP-fossil=1.43E+00+7.05E-02; GWP-GHG=1.43E+00+7.06E-02; GWP-biogenic=3.55E-04+(-1.42E-05); GWP-total=1.43E+00+7.05E-02. The reported full cradle-to-grave TOTAL is 1.66E+00 kg CO2 eq. (Downstream adds 1.60E-01). Mapping of proprietary modules to A1-A3 is an assumption.
